nasb.text: “Drip down, O heavens, from above, And let the clouds pour down righteousness; Let the earth open up and salvation bear fruit, And righteousness spring up with it. I, the Lord, have created it.

esv.text: “Shower, O heavens, from above, and let the clouds rain down righteousness; let the earth open, that salvation and righteousness may bear fruit; let the earth cause them both to sprout; I the Lord have created it.

cnv.text: 諸天啊！你們要從上滴下公義， 讓雲層降下公義。 讓大地裂開，生出救恩， 使公義一同生長， 是我耶和華創造了這事。

ccb.text: “‘我使诸天降下甘露， 云彩降下公义， 使大地裂开， 萌生拯救和公义， 这是我耶和华的作为。’

csbs.text: “诸天哪，从上面降下公义！ 愿云朵倾下公义； 愿大地开裂，救恩结出果实， 使公义一同发芽！ 是我耶和华造了这一切。”
